action.reasoning: Observation: 100 epochs achieved val AP=0.281, eval AP=0.275 (new best). Training plateaued around epoch 87. Have 4.9h left, 15 iterations. Analysis: To boost beyond 0.275, ensembling multiple independent runs is reliable. Each 100-epoch training is ~36min. I can train 2-3 more models with different seeds/configs and ensemble. A bigger/wider model with more layers might also help individually. Decision: Train a second model with different seed + slightly different config (num_layers=5, emb_dim=400, drop=0.5) for 100 epochs, then ensemble with first checkpoint. First, modify train.py to support seed and save to a different path; then update predict.py to support ensemble.
action.command: cp checkpoints/best.pt checkpoints/m1.pt && python train.py --epochs 100 --emb_dim 300 --num_layers 5 --drop 0.5 --seed 1 --out checkpoints/m2.pt
